ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie (e.g., action, drama, comedy) */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Box office performance of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief description of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the movie */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Directed by, Writing Credits) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the crew member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the crew member */,
  "imdb_url" TEXT /* IMDB URL of the crew member */,
  "gender_prob" REAL /* Probability of the crew member's gender (based on their name) */,
  "gender_guess" TEXT /* Guessed gender of the crew member (based on their name) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the crew member */,
  "roles" TEXT /* List of roles the crew member has taken (e.g., director, writer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_crew" (
  "movie_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-crew relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "role" TEXT /* Specific role of the crew member in the movie (e.g., director, screenwriter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_crew_crew_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_member_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_crew_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., action, drama, comedy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_members" (
  "cast_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the cast member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the cast member */,
  "imdb_url" TEXT /* IMDB URL of the cast member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the cast member */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "movie_cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-cast relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast member */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_cast_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("cast_member_id") REFERENCES cast_members ("cast_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., Academy Award, Golden Globe) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Director, Best Actor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_awards" (
  "movie_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-award relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_awards_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
